title: アタシのタイマン、アンタのタイマン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is doing everything in her power to
prepare for the Oka Sho, and I work on several
new training regimens to support her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We toil day after day, working together—and
Hishi Amazon grows in leaps and bounds as a
result of our efforts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her trust in me as her partner deepens when she
sees how dedicated I am to her cause. Meanwhile,
the Oka Sho looms on the horizon...
